profile.title: UserProfile
profile.description: User account settings and system personalization

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth

avatarUrl.description: Avatar preset key or custom image URL

quantumRank.description: Dynamic ranking title based on activity

forum_post.title: ForumPost
forum_post.description: Blog and forum posts containing text, image links, video links, or categories

category.description: Thread categories (e.g., General, Strategy, Success, Tech)

videoUrl.description: Optional video attachment URL (e.g. YouTube/Vimeo embed or direct)

authorId.description: User ID of the thread author

authorName.description: Cached display name of the author

authorAvatar.description: Cached avatar code/url of the author

likedBy.description: List of user IDs who liked this post

repliesCount.description: Total number of replies or comments

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: User replies to a specific forum or blog post

postId.description: The ID of the parent post

authorName.description: Cached display name of the commenter

authorAvatar.description: Cached avatar code/url of the commenter

/profiles/{uid}.description: User profile document keyed by auth UID

/forum_posts/{postId}/comments/{commentI.description: Comments attached to a specific blog/forum thread
